role.label: Legal Entity of Counterparty, Type [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by legal entity of counterparty. A counterparty is the other party that participates in a financial transaction.

role.label: Accounts Payable, Current
role.documentation: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of liabilities incurred (and for which invoices have typically been received) and payable to vendors for goods and services received that are used in an entity's business. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

role.label: Accounts Receivable, before Allowance for Credit Loss
role.documentation: Amount, before allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business.

role.label: Accounts Receivable, after Allowance for Credit Loss
role.documentation: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business.

role.label: Accounts Receivable, after Allowance for Credit Loss, Current
role.documentation: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration from customer for product sold and service rendered in normal course of business, classified as current.

role.label: Accrued Employee Benefits, Current
role.documentation: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations, excluding pension and other postretirement benefits, incurred through that date and payable for perquisites provided to employees pertaining to services received from them. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

role.label: Accumulated Defined Benefit Plans Adjustment Attributable to Parent [Member]
role.documentation: Accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss related to defined benefit plans attributable to the parent.

role.label: Accumulated Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization, Property, Plant, and Equipment
role.documentation: Amount of accumulated depreciation, depletion and amortization for physical assets used in the normal conduct of business to produce goods and services.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax
role.documentation: Amount, after tax, of accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transaction and other event and circumstance from nonowner source.

role.label: Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about components of accumulated other comprehensive income (loss).

role.label: AOCI Attributable to Parent [Member]
role.documentation: Accumulated increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events and circumstances from non-owner sources, attributable to the parent. Excludes net income (loss), and accumulated changes in equity from transactions resulting from investments by owners and distributions to owners.

role.label: Acquired Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Weighted Average Useful Life
role.documentation: Weighted average amortization period of finite-lived intangible assets acquired either individually or as part of a group of assets, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents the reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.

role.label: Additional Paid in Capital, Common Stock
role.documentation: Value received from shareholders in common stock-related transactions that are in excess of par value or stated value and amounts received from other stock-related transactions. Includes only common stock transactions (excludes preferred stock transactions). May be called contributed capital, capital in excess of par, capital surplus, or paid-in capital.

role.label: Additional Paid-in Capital [Member]
role.documentation: Excess of issue price over par or stated value of the entity's capital stock and amounts received from other transactions involving the entity's stock or stockholders.

role.label: Cash and Cash Equivalents [Member]
role.documentation: Currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions. Includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits. Also includes short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

role.label: Cash and Cash Equivalents, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for cash and cash equivalents, including the policy for determining which items are treated as cash equivalents. Other information that may be disclosed includes (1) the nature of any restrictions on the entity's use of its cash and cash equivalents, (2) whether the entity's cash and cash equivalents are insured or expose the entity to credit risk, (3) the classification of any negative balance accounts (overdrafts), and (4) the carrying basis of cash equivalents (for example, at cost) and whether the carrying amount of cash equivalents approximates fair value.

role.periodStartLabel: Cash and cash equivalents, beginning of period
role.periodEndLabel: Cash and cash equivalents, end of period
role.label: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash, and Restricted Cash Equivalents
role.documentation: Amount of cash and cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage. Excludes amount for disposal group and discontinued operations. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

role.totalLabel: Change in cash and cash equivalents
role.label: Cash, Cash Equivalents, Restricted Cash, and Restricted Cash Equivalents, Period Increase (Decrease), Including Exchange Rate Effect
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in cash, cash equivalents, and cash and cash equivalents restricted to withdrawal or usage; including effect from exchange rate change. Cash includes, but is not limited to, currency on hand, demand deposits with banks or financial institutions, and other accounts with general characteristics of demand deposits. Cash equivalents include, but are not limited to, short-term, highly liquid investments that are both readily convertible to known amounts of cash and so near their maturity that they present insignificant risk of changes in value because of changes in interest rates.

role.documentation: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of right to consideration in exchange for good or service transferred to customer when right is conditioned on something other than passage of time.

role.label: Contract with Customer, Liability, Current
role.documentation: Amount of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration has been received or is receivable, classified as current.

role.terseLabel: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
role.label: Contract with Customer, Liability, Revenue Recognized
role.documentation: Amount of revenue recognized that was previously included in balance of obligation to transfer good or service to customer for which consideration from customer has been received or is due.

role.terseLabel: Contracts Accounted for under Percentage of Completion
role.label: Contracts Accounted for under Percentage of Completion [Member]
role.documentation: Modifications to or changes in assumptions surrounding contracts accounted for under the percentage of completion method of accounting. Percentage of completion is a method of accounting whereby profit on a long-term (construction) contracts is recognized based on reliable estimates as to the degree of completion generally based on contractual relationships (costs incurred to total costs anticipated).

role.label: Contract type [Axis]
role.documentation: Contract types

role.label: Contract type [Domain]
role.documentation: [Domain] for Contract types

role.label: Corporate Debt Securities [Member]
role.documentation: Debt securities issued by domestic or foreign corporate business, banks and other entities with a promise of repayment.

role.label: Corporate Segment [Member]
role.documentation: Component of an entity that usually provides financial, operational and administrative support and is considered an operating segment. Excludes intersegment elimination and reconciling items.

role.terseLabel: Segment Reporting, Reconciling Item, Corporate Nonsegment
role.label: Segment Reporting, Reconciling Item, Corporate Nonsegment [Member]
role.documentation: Corporate headquarters or functional department that may not earn revenues or may earn revenues that are only incidental to the activities of the entity and is not considered an operating segment.

role.terseLabel: Cost of sales and services revenues
role.label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
role.documentation: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

role.terseLabel: Cost of sales and service revenues
role.label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold [Abstract]
Cost of Goods and Service [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for cost of product sold and service rendered.

role.label: Cost-type [Member]
role.documentation: Cost-type contract

role.label: Credit Facility [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by type of credit facility. Credit facilities provide capital to borrowers without the need to structure a loan for each borrowing.

role.label: Credit Facility [Domain]
role.documentation: Type of credit facility. Credit facilities provide capital to borrowers without the need to structure a loan for each borrowing.

role.terseLabel: Federal and foreign income taxes currently payable (receivable)
role.label: Current Federal Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of current federal tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, current national tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Current Fiscal Year End Date
role.documentation: End date of current fiscal year in the format --MM-DD.

role.label: Customer withhold of payment
role.documentation: Percentage of customer payment withheld relating to invoices issued under a contract.

Debt Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for information about short-term and long-term debt arrangements, which includes amounts of borrowings under each line of credit, note payable, commercial paper issue, bonds indenture, debenture issue, own-share lending arrangements and any other contractual agreement to repay funds, and about the underlying arrangements, rationale for a classification as long-term, including repayment terms, interest rates, collateral provided, restrictions on use of assets and activities, whether or not in compliance with debt covenants, and other matters important to users of the financial statements, such as the effects of refinancing and noncompliance with debt covenants.

role.label: Debt Instrument [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by type of debt instrument, including, but not limited to, draws against credit facilities.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Basis Spread on Variable Rate
role.documentation: Percentage points added to the reference rate to compute the variable rate on the debt instrument.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Interest Rate, Stated Percentage
role.documentation: Contractual interest rate for funds borrowed, under the debt agreement.

role.label: Debt Instrument [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Name [Domain]
role.documentation: The name for the particular debt instrument or borrowing that distinguishes it from other debt instruments or borrowings, including draws against credit facilities.

role.label: Schedule of Long-Term Debt Instruments [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about long-term debt instrument or arrangement.

role.label: Debt Instrument, Term
role.documentation: Period of time between issuance and maturity of debt instrument, in PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents the reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.

role.terseLabel: Change in deferred federal and foreign income taxes
role.label: Deferred Federal Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred federal tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, deferred national tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Gross
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences.

role.label: Deferred State and Local Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
role.documentation: Amount of deferred state and local tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations. Includes, but is not limited to, deferred regional, territorial, and provincial tax expense (benefit) for non-US (United States of America) jurisdiction.

role.label: Deferred Tax and Other Liabilities, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences, with jurisdictional netting, and liabilities classified as noncurrent and other.

role.terseLabel: Net operating losses, tax credit and other carry-forwards
role.label: Deferred Tax Asset, Net operating losses and tax credit carryforwards
role.documentation: The deferred tax assets relating to state income tax credit carry-forwards (The tax effect as of the balance sheet date of the amount of future tax deductions arising from all unused tax credit carryforwards which have been reduced by a valuation allowance), and the deferred tax assets relating to net operating loss carry-forward (Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible operating loss carryforwards) combined.

role.label: Deferred Tax Asset, Tax Deferred Expense, Capitalized Research and Development Expenses
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from research and development expenses

role.label: Deferred Tax Asset, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits, Pension and Postretirement Benefits
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from pension and postretirement benefits.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Gross
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Net of Valuation Allowance
role.documentation: Amount after allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences and carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating lease liabilities
role.documentation: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating lease liabilities

role.terseLabel: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards, State and Local
role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Operating Loss Carryforwards, State and Local
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible state and local operating loss carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Other
role.documentation: Amount, before allocation of valuation allowance, of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences, classified as other.

role.terseLabel: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards
role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Credit Carryforwards
role.documentation: Amount, before allocation of a valuation allowances, of deferred tax assets attributable to deductible tax credit carryforwards including, but not limited to, research, foreign, general business, alternative minimum tax, and other deductible tax credit carryforwards.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Compensation and Benefits, Share-Based Compensation Cost
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from share-based compensation.

role.terseLabel: Reserves not currently deductible for tax purposes
role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Reserves and Accruals, Accrued Liabilities
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from accrued liabilities.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Tax Deferred Expense, Workers' Compensation
role.documentation: Amount before allocation of valuation allowances of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary differences from workers' compensation.

role.label: Deferred Tax Assets, Valuation Allowance
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax assets for which it is more likely than not that a tax benefit will not be realized.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Net
role.documentation: Amount, after deferred tax asset, of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable differences without jurisdictional netting.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Compensation and Benefits, Pension and Postretirement Benefits
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from pension and postretirement benefits

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Contract Accounting Differences
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from property, plant, and equipment.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Intangible Assets
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from intangible assets other than goodwill.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Leasing Arrangements
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from leasing arrangements.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Other
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences classified as other.

role.label: Deferred Tax Liabilities, Property, Plant and Equipment
role.documentation: Amount of deferred tax liability attributable to taxable temporary differences from property, plant, and equipment.

role.terseLabel: Deferred gain on receipt of grant
role.label: Deferred gain on receipt of property
role.documentation: Amount of gain on the receipt of property that does not qualify for gain recognition as of the balance sheet date.

role.label: Liability, Defined Benefit Pension Plan, Noncurrent
role.documentation: Amount of liability, recognized in statement of financial position, for defined benefit pension plan, classified as noncurrent. Excludes other postretirement benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of actuarial present value of benefits attributed to employee service rendered, excluding assumptions about future compensation level.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), before Tax [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, before Tax [Abstract]
Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Gain (Loss), before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, of accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) for gain (loss) of defined benefit plan, that has not been recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Accumulated Other Comprehensive (Income) Loss, Prior Service Cost (Credit), before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, of accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for cost (credit) of benefit change attributable to participants' prior service from plan amendment or plan initiation of defined benefit plan, that has not been recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit).

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Increase (Decrease) for Actual Return (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in plan assets of defined benefit plan from actual return (loss) determined by change in fair value of plan assets adjusted for contributions, benefit payments, and other expenses.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Actuarial Gain (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) from change in actuarial assumptions which (increases) decreases benefit obligation of defined benefit plan. Assumptions include, but are not limited to, interest, mortality, employee turnover, salary, and temporary deviation from substantive plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amortization of Gain (Loss)
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Amortization Of Gains (Losses), Threshold
role.documentation: Threshold above which unrecognized actuarial gains and losses are amortized.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amortization of Prior Service Cost (Credit)
role.documentation: Amount of prior service cost (credit) recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit) of defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Amounts for Asset (Liability) Recognized in Statement of Financial Position [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Amounts for Asset (Liability) Recognized in Statement of Financial Position [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Change in unamortized benefit plan costs
role.label: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss), Defined Benefit Plan, Gain (Loss), after Reclassification Adjustment, before Tax
role.documentation: Amount, before tax, after reclassification adjustment, of increase (decrease) in accumulated other comprehensive income from gain (loss) of defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Pension and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Amounts that Will be Amortized from Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) in Next Fiscal Year [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Amortization, Next Fiscal Year [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]

role.label: Assets for Plan Benefits, Defined Benefit Plan
role.documentation: Amount of asset, recognized in statement of financial position, for overfunded defined benefit pension and other postretirement plans.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Increase (Decrease) for Assets Transferred to (from) Plan
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in plan assets of defined benefit plan from assets transferred into (from) plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Benefit Obligation, Discount Rate
role.documentation: Weighted average rate for present value of future retirement benefits cash flows, used to determine benefit obligation of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Benefit Obligation, Rate of Compensation Increase
role.documentation: Weighted average rate increase of compensation, used to determine benefit obligation of defined benefit plan. Plan includes, but is not limited to, pay-related defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Benefit Obligation, Weighted-Average Interest Crediting Rate
role.documentation: Weighted-average interest crediting rate used to determine benefit obligation of defined benefit plan. Plan includes, but is not limited to, cash balance and other defined benefit plans with promised interest crediting rate.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Discount Rate
role.documentation: Weighted average rate for present value of future retirement benefits cash flows, used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Expected long-term rate on plan assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Expected Long-Term Rate of Return on Plan Assets
role.documentation: Weighted average rate of return on plan assets, reflecting average rate of earnings expected on existing plan assets and expected contributions, used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Rate of Compensation Increase
role.documentation: Weighted average rate of compensation increase used to determine net periodic benefit cost of defined benefit plan. Plan includes, but is not limited to, pay-related defined benefit plan.

role.terseLabel: Initial health care cost trend rate assumed for next year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Health Care Cost Trend Rate Assumed for Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Health Care Cost Trend Rate Assumed for Next Fiscal Year

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Health Care Cost Trend Rate, Year ultimate rate is reached
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Health Care Cost Trend Rate, Year ultimate rate is reached
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Health Care Cost Trend Rate, Year ultimate rate is reached

role.terseLabel: Gradually declining to a rate of
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Ultimate Health Care Cost Trend Rate
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost, Ultimate Health Care Cost Trend Rate

role.periodStartLabel: Benefit obligation at beginning of year
role.periodEndLabel: Benefit obligation at end of year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of actuarial present value of benefits attributed to service rendered by employee for defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Benefits Paid
role.documentation: Amount of payment to participant of defined benefit plan which decreases benefit obligation. For pension plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, pension benefits and death benefits. For other postretirement plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, prescription drug benefits, health care benefits, life insurance benefits, and legal, educational and advisory services.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Contributions by Plan Participant
role.documentation: Amount of contributions received by defined benefit plan from participant which increase benefit obligation.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Lump-sum Distributions, Number of Participants
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Lump-sum Distributions, Number of Participants

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Payment for Settlement
role.documentation: Amount of payment, which decreases benefit obligation of defined benefit plan, for irrevocable action relieving primary responsibility for benefit obligation and eliminating risk for obligation and assets used to effect settlement. Transaction constituting settlement includes, but is not limited to, making lump-sum cash payment to participant in exchange for their rights to receive specified benefits and purchasing nonparticipating annuity contract. Excludes decreases to benefit obligation for remeasurement due to settlement.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Transferred
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Transferred
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Transferred

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Category [Axis]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Category [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by defined benefit plan asset investment.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Benefit Obligation [Roll Forward]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Benefit Obligation [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Fair Value of Plan Assets [Roll Forward]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Change in Fair Value of Plan Assets [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Contributions by Employer
role.documentation: Amount of contribution received by defined benefit plan from employer which increases plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, (Increase) Decrease for Curtailment
role.documentation: Amount of (increase) decrease in benefit obligation of defined benefit plan from event reducing expected years of future service of present employees or eliminating accrual of benefits for some or all future services of present employees.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Disclosure [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.terseLabel: Effect of One-Percentage Point Change in Assumed Health Care Cost Trend Rates [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Effect of One-Percentage-Point Change in Assumed Health Care Cost Trend Rate [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Effect on postretirement benefit obligations - Decrease
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Effect of One-Percentage-Point Decrease on Accumulated Postretirement Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of decrease in accumulated postretirement benefit obligation from one-percentage-point decrease in assumed health care cost trend rate.

role.terseLabel: Effect on postretirement benefit expense - Decrease
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Effect of One-Percentage-Point Decrease on Service and Interest Cost Components
role.documentation: Amount of decrease in service and interest cost components of net periodic postretirement benefit cost from one-percentage-point decrease in assumed health care cost trend rate.

role.terseLabel: Effect on postretirement benefit obligations - Increase
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Effect of One-Percentage-Point Increase on Accumulated Postretirement Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of increase in accumulated postretirement benefit obligation from one-percentage-point increase in assumed health care cost trend rate.

role.terseLabel: Effect on postretirement benefit expense - Increase
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Effect of One-Percentage-Point Increase on Service and Interest Cost Components
role.documentation: Amount of increase in service and interest cost components of net periodic postretirement benefit cost from one-percentage-point increase in assumed health care cost trend rate.

role.terseLabel: Expected Future Benefit Payments, Fiscal Year Maturity [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment [Abstract]
Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Amortization, Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Amount of cost (credit) included in accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss expected to be recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit) for fiscal year following most recent annual statement of financial position.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Amortization of Gain (Loss), Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Amount included in accumulated other comprehensive income (loss) for gain (loss) of defined benefit plan expected to be recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit for fiscal year following most recent annual statement of financial position.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Amortization of Prior Service Cost (Credit), Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Amount included in accumulated other comprehensive (income) loss for prior service cost (credit) expected to be recognized in net periodic benefit cost (credit) for fiscal year following most recent annual statement of financial position.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, after Year Five for Next Five Years
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in five fiscal years after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in next fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in third fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Benefit Payment, Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of benefit for defined benefit plan expected to be paid in second fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Employer Contributions, Next Fiscal Year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Future Employer Contributions, Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Amount of contribution expected to be received by defined benefit plan from employer in next fiscal year following current fiscal year.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Expected Return (Loss) on Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of expected return (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit, calculated based on expected long-term rate of return and market-related value of plan assets of defined benefit plan.

role.periodStartLabel: Fair value of plan assets at beginning of year
role.periodEndLabel: Fair value of plan assets at end of year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of asset segregated and restricted to provide benefit under defined benefit plan. Asset includes, but is not limited to, stock, bond, other investment, earning from investment, and contribution by employer and employee.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Funded (Unfunded) Status of Plan
role.documentation: Amount of funded (unfunded) status of defined benefit plan, measured as difference between fair value of plan assets and benefit obligation. Includes, but is not limited to, overfunded (underfunded) status.

role.terseLabel: Initial health care cost trend rate assumed for next year
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Health Care Cost Trend Rate Assumed, Next Fiscal Year
role.documentation: Assumed rate, for next fiscal year, based on annual change in cost of health care cost benefits used to measure expected cost of benefits covered by defined benefit postretirement plan. Factors include, but are not limited to, estimate of health care inflation, change in health care utilization or delivery pattern, technological advances, and change in health status of participant. Excludes factors for change in composition of plan population by age and dependency status.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan Health Care Cost Trend Rate, Year ultimate rate is reached
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan Health Care Cost Trend Rate, Year ultimate rate is reached
role.documentation: The year in which the rate reaches the ultimate rate.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Interest Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost recognized for passage of time related to defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Net Periodic Benefit Cost (Credit)
role.documentation: Amount of net periodic benefit cost (credit) for defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Obligations Transferred, Number of Retirees and Beneficiaries
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plan, Obligations Transferred, Number of Retirees and Beneficiaries

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Projected Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Plan Assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Projected Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of plan asset for defined benefit pension plan with projected benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Projected Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Projected Benefit Obligation
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Pension Plan with Projected Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Projected Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of projected benefit obligation for defined benefit pension plan with projected benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.terseLabel: Aggregate accumulated benefit obligation for plans with accumulated benefit obligations in excess of plan assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan with Accumulated Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Accumulated Benefit Obligation
role.documentation: Amount of accumulated benefit obligation for defined benefit plan with accumulated benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.terseLabel: Aggregate fair value of plan assets for plans with accumulated benefit obligations in excess of plan assets
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan with Accumulated Benefit Obligation in Excess of Plan Assets, Plan Assets
role.documentation: Amount of plan asset for defined benefit plan with accumulated benefit obligation in excess of plan assets.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, Increase (Decrease) for Plan Amendment
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in benefit obligation of defined benefit plan from change in terms of existing plan or initiation of new plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Benefits Paid
role.documentation: Amount of payment to participant under defined benefit plan which decreases plan assets. For pension plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, pension benefits and death benefits. For other postretirement plan, payment includes, but is not limited to, prescription drug benefits, health care benefits, life insurance benefits, and legal, educational and advisory services.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Contributions by Plan Participant
role.documentation: Amount of contributions received by defined benefit plan from participant which increases plan assets.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Target Allocation, Percentage
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Target Allocation, Percentage
role.documentation: Percentage of target investment allocation to total plan assets. Includes, but is not limited to, percentage on weighted-average basis if more than one plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Net Periodic Benefit Cost (Credit), Gain (Loss) Due to Curtailment
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit from event reducing expected years of future service of present employees or eliminating accrual of defined benefits for some or all future services of present employees.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Net Periodic Benefit Cost (Credit), Gain (Loss) Due to Settlement
role.documentation: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in net periodic benefit (cost) credit from irrevocable action relieving primary responsibility for benefit obligation and eliminating risk related to obligation and assets used to effect settlement.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Service Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost for actuarial present value of benefits attributed to service rendered by employee for defined benefit plan.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Benefit Obligation, (Increase) Decrease for Settlement
role.documentation: Amount of (increase) decrease to benefit obligation of defined benefit plan from irrevocable action relieving primary responsibility for benefit obligation and eliminating risk for obligation and assets used to effect settlement. Includes, but is not limited to, lump-sum cash payment to participant in exchange for right to receive specified benefits, purchase of nonparticipating annuity contract and change from remeasurement.

role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Plan Assets, Payment for Settlement
role.documentation: Amount of payment, which decreases plan assets of defined benefit plan, for irrevocable action relieving primary responsibility for benefit obligation and eliminating risk for obligation and assets used to effect settlement. Transaction constituting settlement includes, but is not limited to, making lump-sum cash payment to participant in exchange for their rights to receive specified benefits and purchasing nonparticipating annuity contract.

role.terseLabel: Gradually declining to a rate of
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Ultimate Health Care Cost Trend Rate
role.documentation: Ultimate trend rate for health care cost for defined benefit postretirement plan.

role.terseLabel: Weighted Average Assumptions - Net Periodic Benefit Cost [Abstract]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plan, Weighted Average Assumptions Used in Calculating Net Periodic Benefit Cost [Abstract]

role.label: Defined Benefit Plans and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by qualifed or non-qualified defined benefits pension or other postretirement plans.

role.terseLabel: Defined Benefit Plans and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]
role.label: Defined Benefit Plans and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]
role.documentation: Defined Benefit Plans and Other Postretirement Benefit Plans, Type of Plan [Domain]

role.terseLabel: Cost recognized for defined contribution plans
role.label: Defined Contribution Plan, Cost
role.documentation: Amount of cost for defined contribution plan.

role.terseLabel: Maximum annual percentage employer contribution per employee
role.label: Defined Contribution Plan, Employer Matching Contribution, Percent of Employees' Gross Pay
role.documentation: Percentage of employees' gross pay for which the employer contributes a matching contribution to a defined contribution plan.

role.label: Defined Contribution Plan, Liabilities
role.documentation: Defined Contribution Plan, Liabilities

role.label: Depreciation
role.documentation: The amount of expense recognized in the current period that reflects the allocation of the cost of tangible assets over the assets' useful lives. Includes production and non-production related depreciation.

role.label: Depreciation, Depletion and Amortization
role.documentation: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible assets, intangible assets, or depleting assets to periods that benefit from use of the assets.

role.label: Derivative [Member]
role.documentation: This element represents types of derivative financial instruments which are financial instruments or other contractual arrangements with all three of the following characteristics: (a) it has (1) one or more underlyings and (2) one or more notional amounts or payment provisions or both. Those terms determine the amount of the settlement or settlements, and, in some cases, whether or not a settlement is required; (b) it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors; and (c) its terms require or permit net settlement, it can readily be settled net by a means outside the contract, or it provides for delivery of an asset that puts the recipient in a position not substantially different from net settlement. Notwithstanding the above characteristics, loan commitments that relate to the origination of mortgage loans that will be held for sale are accounted for as derivative instruments by the issuer of the loan commitment (that is, the potential lender).

role.label: Disaggregation of Revenue [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Disaggregation of Revenue [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about disaggregation of revenue into categories depicting how nature, amount, timing, and uncertainty of revenue and cash flows are affected by economic factor.

role.label: Disaggregation of Revenue [Table Text Block]
role.documentation: Tabular disclosure of disaggregation of revenue into categories depicting how nature, amount, timing, and uncertainty of revenue and cash flows are affected by economic factor.

role.label: Disaggregation threshold
role.documentation: Minimum percentage of income taxes paid to be disclosed separately.

role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for share-based payment arrangement.

role.terseLabel: Disclosure of Compensation Related Costs, Share-based Payments [Abstract]
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement [Abstract]
Discretionary Contribution [Member]
role.documentation: Contributions made on a discretionary basis above the minimum amounts required under the ERISA rules.

role.label: Dividends, Common Stock, Cash
role.documentation: Amount of paid and unpaid common stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash.

role.label: Document And Entity Information [Abstract]
role.documentation: Document And Entity Information [Abstract]

role.label: Document Annual Report
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true only for a form used as an annual report.

role.terseLabel: Document Financial Statement Error Correction Flag
role.label: Document Financial Statement Error Correction [Flag]
role.documentation: Indicates whether any of the financial statement period in the filing include a restatement due to error correction.

role.label: Document Fiscal Period Focus
role.documentation: Fiscal period values are FY, Q1, Q2, and Q3. 1st, 2nd and 3rd quarter 10-Q or 10-QT statements have value Q1, Q2, and Q3 respectively, with 10-K, 10-KT or other fiscal year statements having FY.

role.label: Document Fiscal Year Focus
role.documentation: This is focus fiscal year of the document report in YYYY format. For a 2006 annual report, which may also provide financial information from prior periods, fiscal 2006 should be given as the fiscal year focus. Example: 2006.

role.label: Document Period End Date
role.documentation: For the EDGAR submission types of Form 8-K: the date of the report, the date of the earliest event reported; for the EDGAR submission types of Form N-1A: the filing date; for all other submission types: the end of the reporting or transition period. The format of the date is YYYY-MM-DD.

role.label: Document Transition Report
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true only for a form used as a transition report.

role.label: Document Type
role.documentation: The type of document being provided (such as 10-K, 10-Q, 485BPOS, etc). The document type is limited to the same value as the supporting SEC submission type, or the word 'Other'.

role.terseLabel: Dividends or Other Earnings Paid on Equity Awards not Otherwise Reflected in Total Compensation for Covered Year
role.label: Dividends or Other Earnings Paid on Equity Awards not Otherwise Reflected in Total Compensation for Covered Year [Member]

role.verboseLabel: Earnings (loss) per share - basic (in dollars per share)
role.label: Earnings Per Share, Basic
role.documentation: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

role.verboseLabel: Earnings (loss) per share - diluted (in dollars per share)
role.label: Earnings Per Share, Diluted
role.documentation: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

role.label: Earnings Per Share [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for earnings per share.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

role.terseLabel: U.S. federal statutory tax rate, percent
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of domestic federal statutory tax rate applicable to pretax income (loss).

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Cross-Border Tax Effect, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of reported income tax expense (benefit) from difference to expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying statutory federal (national) income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operation, attributable to cross-border tax law.

role.terseLabel: Effect of cross-border tax laws, percent
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Cross-Border Tax Effect, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of reported income tax expense (benefit) from difference to expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying statutory federal (national) income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operation, attributable to cross-border tax law.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Foreign Income Tax Rate Differential, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations applicable to statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of the country of domicile.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Nondeductible Expense, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to nondeductible expenses.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Other Adjustments, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to other adjustments.

role.negatedTerseLabel: Interest accrual on tax refunds, percent
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Other Reconciling Items, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of reported income tax benefit (expense) from difference to income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying statutory federal (national) income tax rate to pretax income (loss) from continuing operation, attributable to other reconciling items. Excludes state and local income tax expense (benefit), federal tax expense (benefit), statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of country of domicile, tax credit, nondeductible expense, deduction, income tax settlement, income tax contingency, and cross-border tax law.

role.terseLabel: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, State and Local Jurisdiction, Contribution Greater than 50 Percent, Tax Effect [Extensible Enumeration]
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, State and Local Jurisdiction, Contribution Greater than 50 Percent, Tax Effect [Extensible Enumeration]
role.documentation: Indicates name of state or local jurisdiction that makes up greater than 50 percent of effect of state and local income tax.

role.terseLabel: Change in unrecognized tax benefits, percent
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Contingency, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to income tax contingencies. Includes, but not limited to, domestic tax contingency, foreign tax contingency, state and local tax contingency, and other contingencies.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Other, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to other tax credits.

role.negatedLabel: Research and development tax credit, percent
role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Research, Percent
role.documentation: Percentage of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to research tax credit.

role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Amount [Abstract]

role.terseLabel: Weighted average period of recognition of unrecognized compensation expense
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Cost Not yet Recognized, Period for Recognition
role.documentation: Weighted-average period over which cost not yet recognized is expected to be recognized for award under share-based payment arrangement, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.

role.terseLabel: Unrecognized compensation expense associated with stock awards
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Nonvested Award, Excluding Option, Cost Not yet Recognized, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of cost to be recognized for nonvested award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes share and unit options.

role.terseLabel: Tax benefits recognized for stock-based compensation
role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Expense, Tax Benefit
role.documentation: Amount of tax benefit for recognition of expense of award under share-based payment arrangement.

role.terseLabel: Realized tax benefits from issuance of stock in settlement of RPSRs and RSRs
role.label: Employee Service Share-Based Compensation, Tax Benefit Realized From Issuance Of Instruments Other Than Options
role.documentation: Disclosure of the aggregate tax benefit realized from the issuance of stock and settlement of RPSRs and RSRs.

role.label: Share-Based Payment Arrangement, Option [Member]
role.documentation: Share-based payment arrangement granting right, subject to vesting and other restrictions, to purchase or sell certain number of shares at predetermined price for specified period of time.

role.label: Entity Address, Address Line One
role.documentation: Address Line 1 such as Attn, Building Name, Street Name

role.label: Entity Address, City or Town
role.documentation: Name of the City or Town

role.label: Entity Address, Postal Zip Code
role.documentation: Code for the postal or zip code

role.label: Entity Address, State or Province
role.documentation: Name of the state or province.

role.label: Entity Central Index Key
role.documentation: A unique 10-digit SEC-issued value to identify entities that have filed disclosures with the SEC. It is commonly abbreviated as CIK.

role.label: Entity Common Stock, Shares Outstanding
role.documentation: Indicate number of shares or other units outstanding of each of registrant's classes of capital or common stock or other ownership interests, if and as stated on cover of related periodic report. Where multiple classes or units exist define each class/interest by adding class of stock items such as Common Class A [Member], Common Class B [Member] or Partnership Interest [Member] onto the Instrument [Domain] of the Entity Listings, Instrument.

role.label: Entity Current Reporting Status
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' whether registrants (1) have filed all reports required to be filed by Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 during the preceding 12 months (or for such shorter period that registrants were required to file such reports), and (2) have been subject to such filing requirements for the past 90 days. This information should be based on the registrant's current or most recent filing containing the related disclosure.

role.label: Entity Emerging Growth Company
role.documentation: Indicate if registrant meets the emerging growth company criteria.

role.label: Entity File Number
role.documentation: Commission file number. The field allows up to 17 characters. The prefix may contain 1-3 digits, the sequence number may contain 1-8 digits, the optional suffix may contain 1-4 characters, and the fields are separated with a hyphen.

role.label: Entity Filer Category
role.documentation: Indicate whether the registrant is one of the following: Large Accelerated Filer, Accelerated Filer, Non-accelerated Filer. Definitions of these categories are stated in Rule 12b-2 of the Exchange Act. This information should be based on the registrant's current or most recent filing containing the related disclosure.

role.terseLabel: Entity Incorporation, State or Country Code
role.label: Entity Incorporation, State or Country Code
role.documentation: Two-character EDGAR code representing the state or country of incorporation.

role.label: Entity Interactive Data Current
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true when the registrant has submitted electronically every Interactive Data File required to be submitted pursuant to Rule 405 of Regulation S-T during the preceding 12 months (or for such shorter period that the registrant was required to submit such files).

role.label: Entity Number of Employees
role.documentation: Number of persons employed by the Entity

role.label: Entity Public Float
role.documentation: The aggregate market value of the voting and non-voting common equity held by non-affiliates computed by reference to the price at which the common equity was last sold, or the average bid and asked price of such common equity, as of the last business day of the registrant's most recently completed second fiscal quarter.

role.label: Entity Registrant Name
role.documentation: The exact name of the entity filing the report as specified in its charter, which is required by forms filed with the SEC.

role.label: Entity Shell Company
role.documentation: Boolean flag that is true when the registrant is a shell company as defined in Rule 12b-2 of the Exchange Act.

role.label: Entity Small Business
role.documentation: Indicates that the company is a Smaller Reporting Company (SRC).

role.label: Entity Tax Identification Number
role.documentation: The Tax Identification Number (TIN), also known as an Employer Identification Number (EIN), is a unique 9-digit value assigned by the IRS.

role.label: Entity Voluntary Filers
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' if the registrant is not required to file reports pursuant to Section 13 or Section 15(d) of the Act.

role.label: Entity Well-known Seasoned Issuer
role.documentation: Indicate 'Yes' or 'No' if the registrant is a well-known seasoned issuer, as defined in Rule 405 of the Securities Act. Is used on Form Type: 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, 20-F, 6-K, 10-K/A, 10-Q/A, 20-F/A, 6-K/A, N-CSR, N-Q, N-1A.

role.label: Environmental Costs, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for obligations that resulted from improper or other-than normal operation of a long-lived asset in the past. This accounting policy may address (1) whether the related remediation costs are expensed or capitalized, (2) whether the obligation is measured on a discounted basis, (3) the event, situation, or set of circumstances that generally triggers recognition of loss contingencies arising from the entity's environmental remediation-related obligations, and (4) the timing of recognition of any recoveries.

role.terseLabel: Equity Awards Adjustments, Excluding Value Reported in Compensation Table
role.label: Equity Awards Adjustments, Excluding Value Reported in the Compensation Table [Member]

Equity Component [Domain]
role.documentation: Components of equity are the parts of the total Equity balance including that which is allocated to common, preferred, treasury stock, retained earnings, etc.

role.label: Equity Method Investments [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for equity method of accounting for investments and other interests. Investment includes, but is not limited to, unconsolidated subsidiary, corporate joint venture, noncontrolling interest in real estate venture, limited partnership, and limited liability company. Information includes, but is not limited to, ownership percentage, reason equity method is or is not considered appropriate, and accounting policy election for distribution received.

role.label: Equity Securities [Member]
role.documentation: Ownership interest or right to acquire or dispose of ownership interest in corporations and other legal entities for which ownership interest is represented by shares of common or preferred stock, convertible securities, stock rights, or stock warrants.

role.label: Equity Valuation Assumption Difference, Footnote [Text Block]
Fair Value Hierarchy and NAV [Axis]
role.documentation: Information by level within fair value hierarchy and fair value measured at net asset value per share as practical expedient.

role.terseLabel: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3
role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 [Member]
role.documentation: Fair value measurement input including quoted price in active market for identical asset or liability reporting entity can access at measurement date (level 1), input other than quoted price included within level 1 either directly or indirectly observable for asset or liability (level 2) and unobservable input reflecting entity's own assumption (level 3).

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 1 [Member]
role.documentation: Quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities that the reporting entity can access at the measurement date.

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 2 [Member]
role.documentation: Inputs other than quoted prices included within level 1 that are observable for an asset or liability, either directly or indirectly, including, but not limited to, quoted prices for similar assets or liabilities in active markets, or quoted prices for identical or similar assets or liabilities in inactive markets.

role.label: Fair Value, Inputs, Level 3 [Member]
role.documentation: Unobservable inputs that reflect the entity's own assumption about the assumptions market participants would use in pricing.

role.terseLabel: Fair Value, Investments, Entities that Calculate Net Asset Value Per Share, Unfunded Commitments
role.label: Fair Value, Investments, Entities that Calculate Net Asset Value Per Share, Unfunded Commitments
role.documentation: The amount of unfunded commitments for which the entity is obligated, to those certain investments for which net asset value per share is calculated (including by unit, membership interest, or other equity (ownership interest) unit measure) (alternative investments).

role.terseLabel: Fair Value Measured at Net Asset Value Per Share
role.label: Fair Value Measured at Net Asset Value Per Share [Member]
role.documentation: Fair value measured at net asset value per share as practical expedient.

role.terseLabel: Fair Value, Measurements, Fair Value Hierarchy [Domain]
role.label: Fair Value Hierarchy and NAV [Domain]
role.documentation: Categories used to prioritize the inputs to valuation techniques to measure fair value.

role.label: Fair Value of Financial Instruments, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for determining the fair value of financial instruments.

role.label: FAS CAS Adjustment
role.documentation: The difference between expenses for pension and other postretirement benefits determined in accordance with GAAP and the expenses for these items included in segment operating income in accordance with U.S. Cost Accounting Standards ("CAS")

role.terseLabel: Federal Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations [Abstract]
role.label: Federal Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations [Abstract]
Federal Income Tax Note [Table]
role.documentation: Disclosure of information about federal income tax basis of investment holdings of investment company.

role.label: Finance Lease, Liability
role.documentation: Present value of lessee's discounted obligation for lease payments from finance lease.

role.terseLabel: Finance Lease, Liability, Current, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Current, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.documentation: Indicates line item in statement of financial position that includes current finance lease liability.

role.terseLabel: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.label: Finance Lease, Liability, Noncurrent, Statement of Financial Position [Extensible Enumeration]
role.documentation: Indicates line item in statement of financial position that includes noncurrent finance lease liability.

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Accumulated Amortization
role.documentation: Accumulated amount of amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year One
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Five
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Four
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Three
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Two
role.documentation: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

role.terseLabel: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Net, Amortization Expense, Fiscal Year Maturity [Abstract]
role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Net, Amortization Expense, Fiscal Year Maturity [Abstract]
Finite-Lived Intangible Assets [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Net
role.documentation: Amount after amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

role.label: Fixed Income Securities [Member]
role.documentation: Investment that provides a return in the form of fixed periodic payments and eventual return of principal at maturity.

role.label: Fixed-Price Contract [Member]
role.documentation: Contract with customer in which amount of consideration is fixed.

role.label: Fixed-price incentive [Member]
role.documentation: Contract with customer with a base price, in addition to, a sharel line incentive.

role.label: Forgone Recovery due to Disqualification of Tax Benefits, Amount

role.label: Forgone Recovery due to Expense of Enforcement, Amount

General and Administrative Expense
role.documentation: The aggregate total of expenses of managing and administering the affairs of an entity, including affiliates of the reporting entity, which are not directly or indirectly associated with the manufacture, sale or creation of a product or product line.

role.label: Goodwill
role.documentation: Amount, after accumulated impairment loss, of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

role.label: Goodwill, Acquired During Period
role.documentation: Amount of increase in asset representing future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized resulting from a business combination.

role.label: Goodwill and Intangible Assets Disclosure [Text Block]
role.documentation: The entire disclosure for goodwill and intangible assets.

role.label: Goodwill and Intangible Assets, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for goodwill and intangible assets. This accounting policy also may address how an entity assesses and measures impairment of goodwill and intangible assets.

role.label: Goodwill, Impaired, Accumulated Impairment Loss
role.documentation: Amount of accumulated impairment loss for asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

role.label: Goodwill, Impairment Loss
role.documentation: Amount of impairment loss from asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

role.label: Goodwill [Line Items]
role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.

role.label: Goodwill, Measurement Period Adjustment
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) from measurement period adjustment of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

role.label: Goodwill [Roll Forward]
role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.

role.label: Goodwill, Translation and Measurement Period Adjustments
role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) from foreign currency translation and measurement period adjustments of asset representing future economic benefit arising from other asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, that is not individually identified and separately recognized.

role.label: Government Contractors, Inventory, Policy [Policy Text Block]
role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for determining costs included in inventory.

role.label: Government Contracts Concentration Risk [Member]
role.documentation: Reflects the percentage that revenues in the period from one or more significant customers is to net revenues, as defined by the entity, such as total net revenues, product line revenues, segment revenues. Risk is the materially adverse effects of termination of a significant contract or group of contracts or from future loss of a significant portion of business with a specified political body or unit thereof, such as Department of Defense, US Navy, New York City.

role.label: Government [Member]
role.documentation: Organization that is the governing authority of a community.

role.label: Grant proceeds for capital expenditures
role.documentation: Cash inflow associated with the amount received by grants from the government for capital expenditures.

role.label: Guarantor Obligations, Nature [Axis]

role.documentation: Amount, after income tax refund received, of cash paid to foreign tax jurisdiction for tax on income.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Foreign Income Tax Rate Differential, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to foreign income tax expense (benefit).

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation at Federal Statutory Income Tax Rate, Amount
role.documentation: The amount of income tax expense or benefit for the period computed by applying the domestic federal statutory tax rates to pretax income from continuing operations.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Nondeductible Expense, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to nondeductible expenses.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Other Adjustments, Amount

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Other Reconciling Items, Amount

Excludes state and local income tax expense (benefit), federal tax expense (benefit), statutory income tax expense (benefit) outside of country of domicile, tax credit, nondeductible expense, deduction, income tax settlement, income tax contingency, and cross-border tax law.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Contingency, Amount

Including, but not limited to, domestic tax contingency, foreign tax contingency, state and local tax contingency, and other contingencies.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Other, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to other tax credits.

role.label: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Tax Credit, Research, Amount
role.documentation: Amount of the difference between reported income tax expense (benefit) and expected income tax expense (benefit) computed by applying the domestic federal statutory income tax rates to pretax income (loss) from continuing operations attributable to research tax credit.

role.label: Number of Operating Segments
role.documentation: Number of operating segments. An operating segment is a component of an enterprise: (a) that engages in business activities from which it may earn revenues and incur expenses (including revenues and expenses relating to transactions with other components of the same enterprise), (b) whose operating results are regularly reviewed by the enterprise's chief operating decision maker to make decisions about resources to be allocated to the segment and assess its performance, and (c) for which discrete financial information is available. An operating segment may engage in business activities for which it has yet to earn revenues, for example, start-up operations may be operating segments before earning revenues.

role.label: Number of Reportable Segments
role.documentation: Number of segments reported by the entity. A reportable segment is a component of an entity for which there is an accounting requirement to report separate financial information on that component in the entity's financial statements.

role.label: Number of Reporting Units
role.documentation: Number of reporting units tested for impairment of goodwill. A reporting unit is an operating segment or one level below an operating segment.
